creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Sun, 27 Jun 1999 dkelly@hiwaay.net wrote:

> diff -rc postgresql/Makefile postgresql.orig/Makefile
> *** postgresql/Makefile	Sun Jun 27 21:19:22 1999
> --- postgresql.orig/Makefile	Sat Jun 26 19:21:59 1999

This patch is both reversed and not in unified format.

'diff -ruN postgresql.orig postgresql'
